rationale: Surface shape: CWE-787 unbounded memcpy into a fixed 128B stack buffer. Gated by `capable(CAP_SYS_MODULE)`. kernel-module load grants arbitrary code via insmod path; subsumes memory-corruption primitive. Axis-4 (capability_check) detects the cap call site. Constant `CAP_SYS_MODULE` IS in _PRIVILEGED_CAP_CONSTANTS → verdict policy emits NOT_EXPLOITABLE.
